completion_data.completion_summary: Phase 2 completed: Added Obligation type, omega-squared diagonal enumeration (Nat.unpair + decodeFormula), enriched forward/backward chain constructions with witness formula placement, and full Z-indexed enriched chain assembly. All theorems sorry-free, build passes.

partial_progress.details: Phase 2 (Dovetailing Enumeration) completed. Enriched chain construction with witness placement proven sorry-free. Ready for Phase 3 (Forward F proof).
